title: AI in Your Everyday Life
subtitle: Real ways AI can save you time starting today
description: You don't have to work in tech to benefit from AI. This module is for regular people — students, parents, retirees, anyone with too much to do and not enough hours. Four practical lessons showing how AI handles email, schedules, learning, and all the tedious stuff you hate doing anyway.

lessons.title: AI That Handles Your Inbox
lessons.subtitle: Stop drowning in email — let AI do the heavy lifting

lessons.title: AI That Manages Your Time
lessons.subtitle: Reclaim your calendar before it eats your life

lessons.title: AI That Helps You Learn and Create
lessons.subtitle: Your personal tutor, creative partner, and idea machine

lessons.title: AI That Handles the Boring Stuff
lessons.subtitle: Let AI deal with the tasks you keep putting off
